bordscape.tagline: Entertain visitors of museums and cafè's with games
bordscape.description: Boardscape is a digital escape room playable in the Spellenwereld Museum in Assen, Netherlands. How can games be used to enhance the museum experience?

energy_case.tagline: Using games to raise awareness on climate change
energy_case.description: The Energy Case uses impactful game mechanics and immersive storytelling to push for awareness of climate change and the transition to cleaner energy sources.

sei_leiferser.tagline: A board game to teach kids about their local businesses
sei_leiferser.description: Sei Leiferser is a board game that highlights the importance of fostering local communities. Children can learn about the small businesses in their town and understand the importance of shopping locally.
